textByHash.4062416ca48d6f47273b41dfe66b66cf6438e961: Hello! What can I do for you today?
textByHash.2aca6f77f3d95ad0a5b64e38cba3f7f6649803f9: And it's great to meet you.
textByHash.3ab4341921b105727880378bc73d3b0300116d10: I'm the local wisdom, my dreams are those of prophecy. Would you care for a reading?
textByHash.aa50a4ae1850634ba32d318f8bd2a50cd4d60b17: I see a blinding light! A fire so big the heavens can see it; all those who look upon the great flame struggle to look away.
textByHash.e557bc8151215f9c3798d9f7b500ec8c99f2f764: I see a darkness so thick, light fails to escape it - A shadow world where up is down and right is wrong.
textByHash.40c16d5fbd54c8790c03d8873dd27a309dcb1330: I see peace and prosperity - The air is filled with wonderous bird song and the scent of earth and river.
textByHash.ece8cceba9cfe7c953f076152f052ff98e25fc82: It isn't my place to derive meaning. Allow my foretelling to guide your future but do not rely upon it happening all by itself. We are the arbiters of our own destiny.
textByHash.d67c4f460ba98f68a251dd6425d2d67e2b876d74: It's your choice to believe, not mine.
textByHash.69bf45236b6b8aca76e67c2e8bf1addb7e5bd935: Was there anything else you wanted?
textByHash.ec19cc74057ff6d17bc1f0beec355ce1763b0299: A blissful existence may be the correct path.
textByHash.833e268cd1fa8172c0fb8bd16cb24881e6381de1: I can! This is the quaint town of Gwenith. All those who have been granted access to the great crystal city of Prifddinas are welcome here.
textByHash.ca86ccb65f1caa24bb9911f2986a02780ab69e7f: Ah... It is expected for an outsider like yourself to notice the mountain wonder how we exist in its shadow.
textByHash.9555368f09177f9b3e1c47201db9185a8903802b: We leave the mountain alone and it lets us live peacefully, out of sight of any passing boats.
textByHash.f3e3928ac0656c0beeadb332c5e41ceefed3d7dc: Of course! At the very top of the mountain sits a ruin. Whatever calamity happened there; their ghosts remain.
textByHash.7275d64ffd95d7dc1780b5e5cf4f9b8ea5aaf623: Yes. Explore at your own peril. There are those who have looked for answers from these mynydd spirits. They never return.
textByHash.fe8761fc72411db4034c9d3c72df6e2f09d29a36: Elsewhere? Indeed... As I said, , explore at your own peril. Was there anything else you wanted?
